R

readStringList(String[], ArrayList<Event>) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.User
Populates a list of events from an array of eventIDs
registrationPeriod(String, String) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.EventDetailsActivity
check if registration period is open
removeCoOrganizer(String) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.Event
Removes a user as a co organizer from an event Updates firestore coOrganizer list
removeCoOrganizerInvite(String) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.User
Removes a co-organizer invite from the user Updates Firestore to remove the event from the users coOrganizerInvites
removeFromWaitList(String) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.Event
Remove user id from waitlist
removeOrganizedEvent(Event) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.User
Removes the event from the users organizedEvents Updates Firestore and local list to remove the event
restorePrivate(boolean) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.Event
